DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS MONICA GANJOO AND GANJOO LAW OFFICES' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO AMENDED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFT AND HIS COUNSEL IS GRANTED AS TO INTERROGATORIES 1 AND 5 AND DENIED AS TO INTERROGATORY 2. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. IF DEFENDANT HAS ANY FURTHER RESPONSIVE INFORMATION TO INTERROGATORIES 1 AND 5, HE NEEDS TO PROVIDE IT WITHOUT HIDING BEHIND NON-MERITORIOUS OBJECTIONS. IF HE DOESN'T, HE NEEDS TO EXPLICITLY SO STATE AND/OR REMOVE HIS OBJECTIONS. THE RESPONSE TO INTERROGATORY 2 IS FULL AND NON-EVASIVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Amended Special Interrogatories (Set One); Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft And His Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Valerie Kraml, Esq., of Rupprecht Law Firm, 925-837-0867 for Plaintiff/Cross-defendant and moving party

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFFS MONICA GANJOO AND GANJOO LAW OFFICES' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO AMENDED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFT AND HIS COUNSEL is Granted as to interrogatories 1 and 5 and denied as to interrogatory 2 Sanctions are denied. If defendant has any further responsive information to interrogatories 1 and 5, he needs to provide it without hiding behind non-meritorious objections. If he doesn't, he needs to explicitly so state and/or remove his objections. The response to interrogatory 2 is full and non-evasive. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
